leadText: Solid Rock (Japanese: ハードロック Hard Rock) is an Ability introduced in Generation IV.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Solid Rock reduces damage from supereffective moves by 25%. For example, a move that would do 2× damage will do 1.5× damage instead. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Solid Rock has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] Solid Rock reduces damage from supereffective moves by 25%. For example, a move that would do 2× damage will do 1.5× damage instead.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD T D S Reduces the damage that the Pokémon suffers from super-effective attacks. B S L こうかがばつぐんの わざの ダメージを へらす Conq. Reduces damage from supereffective attacks. MD GtI Reduces damage received from supereffective moves. * The Pokémon takes less damage from supereffective moves. * S MD MD RT DX The Pokémon takes less damage from supereffective moves.
